subject: large one-eyed humanoid (cyclops) wearing industrial diving gear, holding a glowing energy canister, surrounded by electric arcs
description: A massive, muscular one-eyed humanoid dominates the frame, wearing what appears to be an industrial diving helmet clamped over its single eye socket. It grips a large cylindrical glowing device capped with a fiery-orange orb in one raised fist. Blue-white electric lightning arcs radiate in all directions around the figure. Thick pipes or cables loop around the background. The color palette is dominated by electric blue and white crackling energy against a cool blue environment.
foreground: cyclops with industrial helmet holding glowing energy canister
background: electric lightning arcs, blue pipes and cables
emotion: aggressive, powerful, arms raised in threat display
